html:
Exclusive to:

The Cave Holes are naturally spawning objects exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. They appear in the Ruins with random treasure in each Cave Hole. The empty Cave Holes will regenerate new treasures after killing the Ancient Fuelweaver, so by defeating the boss repeatedly, the player is able to farm the Cave Holes for loot.

The items inside cannot be picked up directly. Players can use The Lazy Forager, Polly Roger's Hat or Maxwell's Shadow Servant to collect them. Alternatively, they can use The Lazy Explorer or Wortox's Soul Hop to teleport onto the Cave Hole. After standing inside the Cave Hole for a few seconds, players will be knocked out by shadows, so they can save one use of The Lazy Explorer.

Cave Hole Treasures
Item(s) Chance Quantity
29% 1-3
29% 5-8
12% 1
12% 1
12% 1
3% 1
3% 1

Tips

  • One can make The Lazy Forager in a repaired Ancient Pseudoscience Station, then collect the treasure in the Cave Holes. As The Lazy Forager is refuellable, one can potentially amass a fair amount of Thulecite and Rare Gems.
  • With the correct Insight skills, Wortox can Soul Hop into the Cave Hole to obtain its loot then Soul Echo back out, costing only 1 Soul.
  • Wigfrid with the "Elding Spear Enhancement I" skill can use the Elding Spear's special attack to reach treasures in Cave Hole.

Gallery

  • Wickerbottom using moggles to find Cave Holes.
  • Wortox standing on a cave hole, having accessed it via Soul Hop.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}

The '''Cave Holes''' are naturally spawning objects exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[A New Reign]]''. They appear in the [[Ruins]] with random treasure in each Cave Hole. The empty Cave Holes will regenerate new treasures after killing the [[Ancient Fuelweaver]], so by defeating the boss repeatedly, the player is able to farm the Cave Holes for loot.

The items inside cannot be picked up directly. Players can use [[The Lazy Forager]], [[Polly Roger's Hat]] or [[Maxwell|Maxwell's]] [[Shadow Servant]] to collect them. Alternatively, they can use [[The Lazy Explorer]] or [[Wortox|Wortox's]] Soul Hop to teleport onto the Cave Hole. After standing inside the Cave Hole for a few seconds, players will be knocked out by shadows, so they can save one use of The Lazy Explorer.

== {{pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* One can make The Lazy Forager in a repaired [[Ancient Pseudoscience Station/DST|Ancient Pseudoscience Station]], then collect the treasure in the Cave Holes. As The Lazy Forager is refuellable, one can potentially amass a fair amount of Thulecite and Rare Gems.
* With the correct Insight skills, Wortox can Soul Hop into the Cave Hole to obtain its loot then Soul Echo back out, costing only 1 Soul.
* [[Wigfrid/Don't Starve Together|Wigfrid]] with the "Elding Spear Enhancement I" skill can use the [[Elding Spear]]'s special attack to reach treasures in Cave Hole.
